headline: Coca-Cola vs Exxon: Which Blue Chip Won the Decade?
summary: One blue chip quietly compounded dividends for 64 straight years while the other got kicked out of the Dow during a historic crash. A thousand dollars placed in each tells a surprisingly complicated story about which path actually paid off.

headline: What To Expect From June's Inflation Report As Chip Prices Rise, Energy Falls
summary: Memory inflation, driven by OpenAI's massive DRAM orders and supply constraints, is expected to persist until at least 2028. Read more here.

headline: Apple Hands Broadcom a $30 Billion Lifeline as Trump Declares the Iran Ceasefire Dead
summary: Broadcom rallied on a $30 billion Apple chip commitment and Nvidia climbed on a value case, while a weak Amazon bond sale hinted at cooling AI-capex appetite. Overnight, Trump declared the Iran ceasefire over and U.S. strikes on more than 80 targets sent oil and Treasury yields higher heading into Thursday's open.
